old_claim.note: Bioinformatics provides a capability that enables this technology without being the only possible path.

new_claim_absent: The complete insulin sequence was established in 1955, decades before the graph's bioinformatics node.

source_shape.source_locator: The historical review states that Sanger defined the complete structure and amino-acid sequence of insulin in 1955.
source_shape.source_claim_summary: The review fixes complete insulin amino-acid sequencing in 1955.
source_shape.source_support_rationale: A later computational discipline cannot enable the first chemical protein sequence; bioinformatics scales subsequent sequence analysis instead.

ontology_before: Protein sequencing depended backward on a later computational analysis discipline.
ontology_after: Chemical protein sequencing precedes bioinformatics, which can consume sequence data downstream.
invariant_preserved_or_changed: Changed and locked by graph invariant 2026-07-12-launch-source-check-completion: protein_sequencing no longer directly depends on bioinformatics.
would_reject_if: The node is narrowed to modern high-throughput computational protein sequencing.
The bioinformatics node is redefined and redated to a method used by Sanger before 1955.
short_reason: The complete insulin sequence was established in 1955, decades before the graph's bioinformatics node.
